full_text:
Information about PDS TMA cohort (Hanna Elomaa, 5/2026)

Information about PDS TMA cohort (Hanna Elomaa, 5/2026)

This folder has TMA core maps for PDS_TMA blocks 1-8. With the coordinates (x,y), TMA core information can be linked with S-codes

This folder has TMA core maps for PDS_TMA blocks 1-8. With the coordinates (x,y), TMA core information can be linked with S-codes

FILES:

FILES:

1) Original maps are in separate excels for each TMA.

1) Original maps are in separate excels for each TMA.

2) "TMA_PDS_all.xlsx" has all info combined into one and coordinates added. → this is recommended to use in the future

2) "TMA_PDS_all.xlsx" has all info combined into one and coordinates added. → this is recommended to use in the future

ORIENTATION OF THE BLOCKS:

ORIENTATION OF THE BLOCKS:

Each block has a 6×12 core layout. Core X1,Y1 is located in the upper-left corner of the block, next to the block label!

Each block has a 6×12 core layout. Core X1,Y1 is located in the upper-left corner of the block, next to the block label!
